data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for targeting bindings by biz/location/resource/service/offer/queue/subject.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for targeting bindings, but the evidence provided does not include specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence of such bindings. While the linked use case mentions the need for these bindings, it lacks concrete evidence of their implementation or functionality. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of targeting bindings by biz/location/resource/service/offer/queue/subject.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
